reviews.comment:
Bastante lento el servicio. Debido a su ubicación suele tener mucha gente. NUNCA pude pagar con QR. No la recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
The service is quite slow. Due to its location, it's usually very crowded. I was NEVER able to pay with a QR code. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtd3JYN0NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Son un desastre!!! te atienden de mala manera
Encima los unicos boludos que tenemos que hacer fila somos nosotros (los argentinos) porque si sos paraguayo, te metes colado y no pasa nada!!!

(Translated by Google)
They're a disaster!!! They serve you poorly.
On top of that, the only idiots who have to wait in line are us (Argentines), because if you're Paraguayan, you just jump in and nothing happens!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtd09pbU13EAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Los baños están cerrados y  no te dejan entrar a menos de que compres algo en el Shop. Si estás de viaje, no te conviene pasar por allí, buscá otra estación de servicio cerca.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The restrooms are closed, and they won't let you in unless you buy something at the shop. If you're traveling, don't stop by there; find another gas station nearby.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHdDlXOTR3RRAB
